programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: It is the mating season, Pretty Wing and Golden Eye only have eyes for ganders and forget about their chores

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: During a flight in snowy country, Nils is getting very hungry. Gorgo offers to share some tasty worms but Nils is almost ill just looking at them

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: The boys go on a quest to find a legendary demon who is so scary his name must never be said out loud

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Lotus starts to turn into a bamboo plant after being bitten by a snake, and Tashi and Jake must find a cure before the Baron cuts down the whole bamboo forest

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the exceptional men for a year of their lives

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The trainee troopers prepare for their final riding exam over one of the Army's toughest courses. Originally hopeless horseman Glenn is apprehensive - as is Adrian Van Loon, whose kit often fails to meet the rigorous standards. Gunners from the armoured regiment practise on the firing range with live ammunition, and the Household Cavalry's historian talks about their role in the battle of Waterloo

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part four of eight. A hallway in the station has become a re-creation of a submarine where three young men died from lack of oxygen

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by Stereophonics frontman Kelly Jones, who discusses some of his favourite songs, including Otis Redding's Cigarettes and Coffee and Who Killed Davey Moore? by Bob Dylan

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy receives a letter from school, prompting him to help Alex realise his potential. With the attention on her brother, Molly relishes the fact that her behaviour goes virtually unnoticed. Meanwhile, girlfriend Siobhan and Kev both feel neglected. Nicholas Lyndhurst stars

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Poplar for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 36-year-old man with gout visits the hospital, and despite the ailment's age-old associations with elderly men and rich living, he discovers his is hereditary. The doctors hear from a woman seeking a dietary cure for depression, and a mother-of-three who has lived on pancakes and chocolate for two years. Dr Pixie McKenna is also on hand to reveal the truth about detox diets

programme.title: Eight O'Clock Walk (1954)
programme.desc: A taxi driver is the victim of an April Fools' Day prank when he is called out to a derelict area - but when an eight-year-old girl is later murdered at the site, he is wrongly charged with the crime. A lawyer is moved by the defendant's wife to represent him, only to face a prosecution case made by his own father. Crime drama, starring Richard Attenborough and Cathy O'Donnell

programme.title: Too Many Crooks (1959)
programme.desc: Bungling crooks kidnap a millionaire's wife, but he is glad to be rid of her and refuses to pay the ransom - so she gets her own back by helping them steal all his cash instead. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, George Cole, Sid James, Brenda De Banzie and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Kingston in Decay?
programme.desc: Shops, housing, attractions, local industry - all are subject to the lens and commentary of a Kingston & District Cine Club member in this amateur film. Shot on 8mm film

programme.title: This Is London
programme.desc: Take a tour of London through some of the city's most exciting, trendiest businesses and products, featuring ads from Elan Cafe, Cityspace, The Oblique Life and more

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Jimmy receives a letter from school, prompting him to help Alex realise his potential. With the attention on her brother, Molly relishes the fact that her behaviour goes virtually unnoticed. Meanwhile, girlfriend Siobhan and Kev both feel neglected. Nicholas Lyndhurst stars

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tour exploring Thamesmead for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Next Big Thing
programme.desc: International Arts Judge James Nicholls is searching for emerging painters, sculptors, photographers and street artists

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Roy visits Amber's therapist to help raise his spirits, and ends up revealing fantasies about his neighbour Sally, whom the counsellor then meets at a dinner party, where a mutual attraction quickly develops, urging Tom and Roy to take desperate measures to keep them apart. Comedy, starring Clive Swift and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: The sacrifices and hard work of being a choir boy at St Paul's Cathedral

programme.title: Discover London
programme.desc: Explore hidden gems and alternative areas of the capital, learning more about the cultural history of one of the world's greatest cities

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Part two of two. Stan is captured by the Argentinean army and sentenced to death - so stalls for time by telling them the story of his adventures

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: The lonely residents of the street find company with each other as Christmas arrives. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Away (2016)
programme.desc: In Blackpool, an unlikely friendship blossoms between a lonely, suicidal widower and a young woman trying to escape an abusive ex-boyfriend. Drama, starring Timothy Spall, Juno Temple and Matt Ryan

programme.title: Purge of Kingdoms (2019)
programme.desc: The leaders of eight rival noble houses gather for a festival designed to settle their long-standing feuds once and for all. Meanwhile, the king who rules over them all has to contend with his own family plotting to have him assassinated. Fantasy spoof, starring Angus MacFadyen and Lou Ferrigno

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary goes to the pub to drown his sorrows, so Dermot invites Deborah to their flat for a romantic evening of candlelight, dinner and music. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot is sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles, while Gary, on the other hand, is offered a new post. However, he has difficulty breaking the news to George and Anthea. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Old Guys

programme.desc: The geese hear a call for help and land in a field, when they discover that the call came from Krobak, the Black Elf's henchman

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: It's spring and the geese reach the end of their migration north. Our flock is delighted to be back home

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: A magic carpet sends Jack and Tashi back to prehistoric times. When they return, they discover they have changed history so monkeys now rule the world

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack buys a pair of magic shoes that will help him win a dance contest. However, he finds that once they start dancing, they cannot stop

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the exceptional men, soon to be joined by women, for a year of their lives

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: The Old Guys
programme.desc: Roy visits Amber's therapist to help raise his spirits, and ends up revealing fantasies about his neighbour Sally, whom the counsellor then meets at a dinner party, where a mutual attraction quickly develops, urging Tom and Roy to take desperate measures to keep them apart. Comedy, starring Clive Swift and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: The sacrifices and hard work of being a choir boy at St Paul's Cathedral

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The Second World War saw men from all classes unite to fight the Nazis, and this programme meets some of the last surviving pilots of the Battle of Britain. Women, who had been excluded from many jobs, worked in everything from anti-aircraft gun batteries to steel-making factories. The Blitz saw rescue workers risk all to save those trapped in bombed buildings. For many of the era's last survivors, the defiant spirit that brought the nation together remains one of their proudest moments, as this documentary reveals

programme.title: The Face at the Window (1939)
programme.desc: In 1880, Paris is terrorised by a hideous murderer. An innocent man is accused of being the killer by a respected aristocrat who longs to get him out of the way so he can seduce his fiancee - but may also have other reasons for wanting a scapegoat. Horror, starring Tod Slaughter and John Warwick

programme.title: The Slipper and the Rose (1976)
programme.desc: A girl is reduced to being the downtrodden servant of her cruel stepmother after her father's death. With a little help from her fairy godmother, she wins the heart of a handsome prince, who is desperately trying to avoid being forced into a political marriage by his parents. Musical version of Cinderella, starring Gemma Craven and Richard Chamberlain

programme.title: Trio (1950)
programme.desc: Adaptation of three short stories by W Somerset Maugham, The Verger, Mr Know-Al, and The Sanatorium. Starring James Hayter, Anne Crawford and Jean Simmons

programme.title: Discover London
programme.desc: Explore hidden gems and alternative areas of the capital, learning more about the cultural history of one of the world's greatest cities

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael Caine buys a birthday present for Mrs Huggett. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael tries to get Joe Pesci to star in his proposed new film Bongo in the Congo, but receives an unenthusiastic response. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick decides to dedicate his life to religion, while Joe receives decorating advice from Roger Moore. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick's preaching starts to annoy the neighbours and Dirk Bogarde reveals some information to the police. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Nothing But the Truth (2008)
programme.desc: A reporter uncovers an international political scandal, but breaking the story entails revealing the identity of an undercover CIA agent. She refuses to reveal her source to the government, and is imprisoned. While she takes her legal battle to the supreme court, the exposed spy finds her career on the line and her life in danger. Thriller, starring Kate Beckinsale and Vera Farmiga

programme.title: The Conversations (2016)
programme.desc: A disillusioned dentist tries to become a stand-up comic, but finds he is unable to perform on stage due to his unrequited love for an American woman who is about to return to the States, never to be seen again. In desperation he seeks a way to have her permanently erased from his memory. Comedy drama, starring Haider Zafar and Daniella Down

programme.title: The Best of IBA Fight Night
programme.desc: Alan Mortlock brings you the best bouts from his IBA unlicensed boxing events from events across London and Essex. See prize fighting in its raw form as contenders go toe-to-toe in the ring

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unintentionally surrounded themselves with criminals

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael Caine buys a birthday present for Mrs Huggett. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

For many of the era's last survivors, the defiant spirit that brought the nation together remains one of their proudest moments, as this documentary reveals

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the exceptional men, soon to be joined by women, for a year of their lives

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: First episode of the animated series about a pop group's adventures during a world tour. The girls break down in Transylvania and seek shelter in a mad scientist's castle

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The band helps a young fan to drum up publicity for a struggling diner by faking an alien encounter

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: The boys build a monster to protect their log fort, but it ends up causing more damage than it prevents

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack, Ah Chu and Tashi find a haunted house in the forest, where Little Sister is hiding a tiger cub. However, she soon finds that others are looking for her new pet

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The Second World War saw men from all classes unite to fight the Nazis, and this programme meets some of the last surviving pilots of the Battle of Britain. Women, who had been excluded from many jobs, worked in everything from anti-aircraft gun batteries to steel-making factories. The Blitz saw rescue workers risk all to save those trapped in bombed buildings. For many of the era's last survivors, the defiant spirit that brought the nation together remains one of their proudest moments, as this documentary reveals

programme.title: She Shears
programme.desc: In the gruelling world of competitive sheep shearing women and men compete together. This is the story of five women for whom shearing is not just a job

programme.title: King Willy
programme.desc: A portrait of the famous old Hampstead pub William IV. Observe the action and hear from a number of regulars about their experiences and enjoyment of this establishment

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: Too Many Crooks (1959)
programme.desc: Bungling crooks kidnap a millionaire's wife, but he is glad to be rid of her and refuses to pay the ransom - so she gets her own back by helping them steal all his cash instead. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, George Cole, Sid James, Brenda De Banzie and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Turn the Key Softly (1953)
programme.desc: Three women are released from prison and set about the difficult task of staying on the straight and narrow. Drama, starring Joan Collins, Yvonne Mitchell and Kathleen Harrison

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court

programme.title: She Did That ()
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of successful black businesswomen Luvvie Ajayi, Lisa Price, Melissa Butler and Tonya Rapley

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: 16th-century Europe was a hotbed of tense international intrigue. Mary Stuart and Elizabeth I confront one another on matters religious, political and personal

programme.title: Urban Hymn (2015)
programme.desc: A teenager is encouraged by her social worker to use singing as an escape route from her troubled personal life. She soon finds her loyalties divided between the fresh start music provides for her and the influence of her possessive and volatile best friend. Drama, starring Letitia Wright, Shirley Henderson and Ian Hart

programme.title: Six Rounds
programme.desc: Among the 2011 London riots, a former boxer, must choose between his lower-class past plagued by crime or a new love and future in a middle-class society that he does not fit into

programme.title: Relentless (2020)
programme.desc: An ex-convict must stay out of trouble for one more day to secure his freedom - but must choose between his principles and his future when he comes to the aid of a prostitute under threat from a gang. Action thriller, starring Steven Murphy and Tiffany-Ellen Robinson

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney looks at the effect of time on gangs and their origins, from bikers to Irish travellers, as their roots are dying out with every new generation

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by Stereophonics frontman Kelly Jones, who discusses some of his favourite songs, including Otis Redding's Cigarettes and Coffee and Who Killed Davey Moore? by Bob Dylan

programme.title: Turn the Key Softly (1953)
programme.desc: Three women are released from prison and set about the difficult task of staying on the straight and narrow. Drama, starring Joan Collins, Yvonne Mitchell and Kathleen Harrison

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Manchester United v Tottenham Hotspur. Action from the showpiece encounter at Wembley Stadium, where the first major trophy of the season was contested. Spurs were the holders, having defeated Chelsea 2-1 after extra time in last year's final, while the Red Devils had last lifted the cup in 2006 following a comfortable 4-0 win against Wigan Athletic

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium, where the winner of the first major trophy of the 2011/12 season was decided. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Championship and will have fancied their chances of producing an upset

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Swansea City. Highlights from Wembley Stadium in 2013, where the League Two Bantams were aiming to produce yet another cup upset. Swansea were appearing in their first major cup final and beat Chelsea in the semi-finals to reach this stage, but Bradford had stolen most of the headlines in the competition this season, belying their lowly league status to eliminate the likes of Arsenal, Aston Villa and Wigan Athletic

programme.title: The Players Championship Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the first day's play of the tournament, taking place at TPC Sawgrass in Ponte Vedra Beach, Florida. Rory McIlroy was the last winner of this competition back in March 2019, as the tournament was cancelled last year due to the coronavirus pandemic. Previous winners of this competition include Webb Simpson, Kim Si-woo and Rickie Fowler. Tiger Woods has also succeeded at this tournament twice, but won't be appearing this year due to his car accident in February.

programme.title: The Players Championship Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the second day's play of the tournament, taking place at TPC Sawgrass in Ponte Vedra Beach, Florida. Australian golfer Greg Norman holds the record for best score at this competition, a record he has held since 1994. He finished with a score of 24-under-par, finishing four strokes clear of nearest challenger Fuzzy Zoeller. No other player in the competition's history has ever finished with a score of 20-under-par or more.
